_meta.keyKnowledge: We develop media production skills by exploring how images, sounds and text can be shaped to share ideas.

_source.w: We develop media production skills by exploring how images, sounds and text can be shaped to share ideas.
y: Experimenting with media tools helps us discover new ways to tell stories.
Understanding how changing one element changes the whole meaning gives us creative power.
Building technical skills opens up more possibilities for our creative work.
eg: We ask 'How does the meaning change when I change the sound effects on this image?'.
We explore how camera framing — close-up, medium, wide — changes how we see a subject.
We experiment with editing images and sounds to create different moods.
We try different transitions between scenes to see which works best for our story.
We explore how text placement and font choice changes the feeling of a media work.
We investigate how lighting and colour affect the mood of photographs.
